text.title: continuous-discovery-habits Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-discovery-habits as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Discovery as one-time project kickoff: interviews only when building new features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One-time discovery produces a roadmap calibrated to a single point in time. Weekly cadence keeps calibration continuous as customer behavior and market evolve.

failure-mode.description: PM does all discovery alone; Design and Tech leads don't attend interviews.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trio dilution causes Design and Tech to lose customer intuition. OST scoring anchors on PM bias rather than cross-functional perspective. Rotate which Lead reviews synthesis each week.

failure-mode.description: OST rot: opportunities accumulate because agents add fast but humans prune slow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a monthly archival pass, the tree becomes unsearchable in ~8 weeks. Schedule a monthly kill-list pass as mandatory, not optional.

failure-mode.description: Intake-classifier passing "add filter X" through without explicit few-shot rejection examples.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide at least 10 few-shot rejections of solution-phrased requests in the classifier prompt. Without examples, the classifier will accept solution framing at the same rate as humans do without training.

failure-mode.description: OST-curator aggressively deduping and merging opportunities that cross different Outcomes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require human review on any merge that crosses Outcome boundaries. Cross-Outcome merges lose the linkage between an opportunity and its parent Outcome metric.

failure-mode.description: Opportunity-scorer hallucinating reach numbers when analytics fetch fails.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require a fetched_at timestamp and source URL in every score row. Reject scores without provenance rather than proceeding with fabricated numbers.

failure-mode.description: Trio-deliberation agent rubber-stamping the highest-scoring opportunity every run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the agent to nominate a devil's-advocate alternative on every run. Without this, the deliberation reduces to a score-sorter rather than a reasoning process.

failure-mode.description: Outcome-tracker declaring improvement on noisy daily metrics after a single positive day.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require a 2-week rolling window minimum before any Outcome status change. Single-day signals are noise at standard metric variance levels.
